subject: tieng-anh
topic: Đề thi thử cuối học kỳ 2 — Tiếng Anh 8 (bấm giờ)

questions.question: What does 'pollution' mean? (Từ 'pollution' nghĩa là gì?)
What is the English word for 'lũ lụt'? ('lũ lụt' tiếng Anh là gì?)
Which is a renewable energy source? (Đâu là nguồn năng lượng tái tạo?)
Choose the passive form: 'Rice ___ in Vietnam.' (được trồng)
Complete (first conditional): 'If we plant trees, the air ___ be cleaner.' (điền 'will')
Match the natural disaster with its meaning (Nối thiên tai với nghĩa)
Past continuous: 'They ___ football when it rained.' (đang chơi)
Choose the superlative: 'Russia is the ___ country in the world.' (lớn nhất)

statements.text: Solar and wind are renewable energy sources.
An earthquake is a natural disaster.
Burning coal is good for the air.

questions.question: Write the past participle of 'make' (Viết quá khứ phân từ của 'make'): It is ___.
What is the best way to save energy? (Cách tốt nhất để tiết kiệm năng lượng?)
options: turn off lights when not in use

questions.question: What is the capital of England? (Thủ đô của nước Anh là gì?)

questions.passage: Natural disasters such as floods and storms cause great damage every year. They destroy houses and crops. People should prepare carefully to stay safe when disasters happen.
questions.question: What do natural disasters destroy, according to the passage? (Thiên tai phá hủy những gì?)

questions.passage: Natural disasters such as floods and storms cause great damage every year. They destroy houses and crops. People should prepare carefully to stay safe when disasters happen.
questions.question: What should people do to stay safe? (Người ta nên làm gì để an toàn?)

questions.passage: Natural disasters such as floods and storms cause great damage every year. They destroy houses and crops. People should prepare carefully to stay safe when disasters happen.
questions.question: Which are examples of natural disasters in the passage? (Ví dụ về thiên tai trong bài là gì?)
Say that you have never been to England (Nói rằng em chưa từng đến nước Anh)
options: I have never been to England.
